enter_bootloader_hint: Power the case DOWN. Take the module out of the case (leave its power cable connected), plug the ST-Link ribbon onto the module's programming header, then power the case back ON. (Afterwards: power down, unplug the ST-Link, remount the module.)
command: openocd -f interface/stlink.cfg -f target/stm32f4x.cfg -c "program {firmware} verify reset exit"
